$comment: Generated from the hub catalog by tools/gen-app-defs.mjs edit the catalog, not here.
name: Holo Browser
summary: A web browser that treats every page — web, local or holo:// — as verifiable content.

tools.name: browser_open
tools.description: Open a URL in Holo Browser's content-addressed loader and return a self-verifying snapshot: the served/minted κ (a did:holo you re-derive, Law L5), final URL, title, extracted text and links. Accepts holo://κ, ipfs://, ENS .eth and http(s) (a live page is fetched once and minted into a κ).

url.description: holo://κ, ipfs://…, name.eth, or an http(s) URL

tools.name: browser_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL through Holo Browser's loading seam and return its content address (κ / did:holo) plus content-type and size, re-derived (Law L5) the bytes are content-addressed substrate, not a trusted response.

description.p: The web asks you to trust the server that sent each byte; it shouldn't have to.
Multi-tab navigation, an omnibox and a scheme registry (holo:// · κ: · ipfs://) fetch every byte and re-derive it before rendering (Law L5).

ul: Browse the open web, local pages and content-addressed pages
Multi-tab sessions, history and omnibox autocomplete
Every byte verified by content (Law L5)
Serverless the browser is the peer

releases.description: Hologram-native Chromium: the browser process as a holospace multi-tab WebContents, NavigationController, omnibox AutocompleteController, SchemeRegistry, and a URLLoaderFactory→ResourceHandler→KappaStore loading seam (every byte re-derived, Law L5). Browse holo://κ / IPFS / ENS / live web as content-addressed substrate (live pages minted into a κ). Drivable by humans and AI agents (window.HoloBrowser + MCP tools). The native CEF build is the host.
